signals.name: Solar Wind Speed
signals.desc: Plasma stream velocity from coronal holes. Higher speeds impact satellite connectivity and power grids.

signals.name: Solar Wind Density
signals.desc: Proton concentration in solar wind. Increased density puts pressure on Earth's magnetopause.

signals.name: Interplanetary Bz Field
signals.desc: North-South component of solar magnetic field. Negative Bz opens Earth's field to solar wind particles.

signals.name: Interplanetary Bt Field
signals.desc: Total strength of interplanetary magnetic field. High values indicate magnetic compression.

signals.name: Geomagnetic Kp Index
signals.desc: Global magnetic disturbance index. Level 5+ indicates geomagnetic storm status.

signals.name: Earthquake Count (24h)
signals.desc: Total count of global seismic events recorded by USGS in the last day.

signals.name: Maximum Earthquake Magnitude
signals.desc: Peak magnitude value among recent seismic activity.

signals.name: Average Earthquake Magnitude
signals.desc: Average magnitude of global earthquakes. Higher values show elevated crustal stress.

signals.name: Total Seismic Energy Released
signals.desc: Calculated physical energy release. Significant spikes indicate massive single rupture events.

signals.name: Washington Temperature
signals.formula: Linear deviation from optimal 20°C: 0°C dev = 100, 25°C dev = 0
signals.desc: Current air temperature in Washington. Excess deviation indicates extreme thermal loads.

signals.name: Washington Wind Speed
signals.desc: Current wind velocity in Washington. High values correspond to storm front alerts.

signals.name: Washington Precipitation
signals.desc: Current hourly precipitation in Washington. High values indicate flooding potentials.

signals.name: Washington Surface Pressure
signals.formula: Linear pressure deviation: 0 dev = 100, 40 hPa dev = 0
signals.desc: Atmospheric pressure in Washington. Deep pressure drops indicate cyclone fronts.

signals.name: S&P 500 Index Daily Return
signals.desc: Percentage return of S&P 500 Index. Drops denote macroeconomic stress.

signals.name: S&P 500 Index Intra-day Volatility
signals.desc: Intraday price spread (high-low) for S&P 500 Index. Wide spreads denote high liquidity uncertainty.

signals.name: NASDAQ Composite Daily Return
signals.desc: Percentage return of NASDAQ Composite. Drops denote macroeconomic stress.

signals.name: NASDAQ Composite Intra-day Volatility
signals.desc: Intraday price spread (high-low) for NASDAQ Composite. Wide spreads denote high liquidity uncertainty.

signals.name: Dow Jones Industrial Daily Return
signals.desc: Percentage return of Dow Jones Industrial. Drops denote macroeconomic stress.

signals.name: Dow Jones Industrial Intra-day Volatility
signals.desc: Intraday price spread (high-low) for Dow Jones Industrial. Wide spreads denote high liquidity uncertainty.

signals.name: DAX 40 (Germany) Daily Return
signals.desc: Percentage return of DAX 40 (Germany). Drops denote macroeconomic stress.

signals.name: DAX 40 (Germany) Intra-day Volatility
signals.desc: Intraday price spread (high-low) for DAX 40 (Germany). Wide spreads denote high liquidity uncertainty.

signals.name: CAC 40 (France) Intra-day Volatility
signals.desc: Intraday price spread (high-low) for CAC 40 (France). Wide spreads denote high liquidity uncertainty.

signals.name: CBOE Volatility Index (VIX)
signals.desc: Wall Street fear gauge. Rises above 25 indicate severe volatility and investor anxiety.

signals.name: US 10-Year Treasury Yield
signals.desc: Benchmark US interest rate proxy. Major sudden deviations trigger capital reallocation panic.

signals.name: Crude Oil (WTI) Price Momentum
signals.desc: Intraday return of Crude Oil (WTI). Price volatility indicates disruption in logistics and supply.

signals.name: Natural Gas Price Momentum
signals.desc: Intraday return of Natural Gas. Price volatility indicates disruption in logistics and supply.

signals.name: Gold Bullion Price Momentum
signals.desc: Intraday return of Gold Bullion. Price volatility indicates disruption in logistics and supply.

signals.name: Silver Price Momentum

signals.name: Copper Metal Price Momentum

signals.name: Wheat Commodity Price Momentum
signals.desc: Intraday return of Wheat Commodity. Price volatility indicates disruption in logistics and supply.

signals.name: Corn Commodity Price Momentum
signals.desc: Intraday return of Corn Commodity. Price volatility indicates disruption in logistics and supply.

signals.name: Soybeans Price Momentum
signals.desc: Intraday return of Soybeans. Price volatility indicates disruption in logistics and supply.

signals.name: EUR / USD Rate Momentum
signals.desc: Exchange rate changes of EUR / USD Rate. Extreme daily swings indicate currency run conditions.

signals.name: GBP / USD Rate Momentum
signals.desc: Exchange rate changes of GBP / USD Rate. Extreme daily swings indicate currency run conditions.

signals.name: USD / JPY Rate Momentum

signals.name: USD / CNY Rate Momentum

signals.name: Bitcoin Daily Return
signals.desc: Percentage price momentum of Bitcoin. Heavy crypto liquidation maps to global systemic margin risk.

signals.name: Ethereum Daily Return
signals.desc: Percentage price momentum of Ethereum. Heavy crypto liquidation maps to global systemic margin risk.

signals.name: Solana Daily Return
signals.desc: Percentage price momentum of Solana. Heavy crypto liquidation maps to global systemic margin risk.

signals.name: Geopolitical News Saturation
signals.desc: Total density of global headlines containing military, war, or sanctions terms.

signals.name: Global Press Tone Index
signals.desc: Heuristic news headline sentiment. Drop in tone suggests media preparation for escalating conflicts.

signals.name: ReliefWeb Active Crises Count
signals.desc: Volume of active disaster response and humanitarian conflict documents indexed by the UN.

signals.name: Wiki Attention: World War III
signals.desc: Daily pageviews of Wikipedia article "World War III". Massive search spikes indicate rising public fear.

signals.name: Wiki Attention: Cyberwarfare
signals.desc: Daily pageviews of Wikipedia article "Cyberwarfare". Massive search spikes indicate rising public fear.

signals.name: Wiki Attention: Terrorism

signals.name: Reddit Headline Sentiment
signals.desc: Aggregated sentiment from the top trending posts on /r/worldnews.

signals.name: Reddit Engagement Volume
signals.desc: Aggregated comment count on active threads. Spike indicate breaking political events.

signals.name: Mastodon Topic Sentiment
signals.desc: Sentiment score of recent posts tag-matched for #politics.

signals.name: DNS Latency: GOOGLE
signals.desc: TCP routing latency to DNS server GOOGLE (2.4ms). High values indicate routing degradation.

signals.name: DNS Status: GOOGLE
signals.desc: Connectivity status for GOOGLE. 0 indicate regional BGP routing block or hardware failure.

signals.name: DNS Latency: CLOUDFLARE
signals.desc: TCP routing latency to DNS server CLOUDFLARE (3.0ms). High values indicate routing degradation.

signals.name: DNS Status: CLOUDFLARE
signals.desc: Connectivity status for CLOUDFLARE. 0 indicate regional BGP routing block or hardware failure.

signals.name: DNS Latency: QUAD9
signals.desc: TCP routing latency to DNS server QUAD9 (1.5ms). High values indicate routing degradation.

signals.name: DNS Status: QUAD9
signals.desc: Connectivity status for QUAD9. 0 indicate regional BGP routing block or hardware failure.

signals.name: DNS Latency: OPENDNS
signals.desc: TCP routing latency to DNS server OPENDNS (2.4ms). High values indicate routing degradation.

signals.name: DNS Status: OPENDNS
signals.desc: Connectivity status for OPENDNS. 0 indicate regional BGP routing block or hardware failure.

signals.name: DNS Latency: LEVEL3
signals.desc: TCP routing latency to DNS server LEVEL3 (2.0ms). High values indicate routing degradation.

signals.name: DNS Status: LEVEL3
signals.desc: Connectivity status for LEVEL3. 0 indicate regional BGP routing block or hardware failure.
